data.name: Hentai Tales: Sexual Guidance Class
data.detailed_description:
遊戲玩法

在完成棘手的難題時享受一個感性的故事！
使用板上的所有正方形連接數字
完成難題後，您將解鎖性感的新圖像和故事的下一部分！
您能完成每個難題並結識所有女孩嗎？

故事背景

Evergreen Academy：從表面上看，它像常規學院一樣簡單而優雅，但實際上，它隱藏了一種奇怪的常識替代機制。
當學生進入那個特殊的“性指導課堂”時，社會規範和道德概念將悄悄地改變。

人物

科琳·莫里亞（Corinne Moridia）：

Moridia家族的女兒外觀高尚而寒冷，但對她心中未知的好奇心充滿了好奇。
她傲慢和渴望統治貴族獨有的願望，但在某些情況下也表現出意想不到的服從。

Layla Safirale：

Saffie家族的紫頭髮毒藥公主有淺藍色的捲發，並穿著特殊的校服。
她神秘的垂直學生和下腹部的“聖標”表明了她的非凡血統。

特徵

  • 20個美麗女孩的性感和色情圖像。
  • 一個夢幻般的色情故事，有著獨特的個性。
  • 如果您只想欣賞這個故事，就可以跳過難題。 （在難題期間按Enter）。
  • CG畫廊模式。 （完成拼圖後，單擊CG旁邊的左右按鈕）。

*具備完整音效支援的語言

data.name: Hentai Tales: Sexual Guidance Class
data.detailed_description:
GamePlay

Enjoy a sensual story while completing tricky puzzles!
Connect the numbers sequentially, using all of the squares on the board
After completing a puzzle, you will unlock a sexy new image and the next part of the story!
Can you complete every puzzle and meet all of the girls?!

Story Background

Evergreen Academy: On the surface, it is as simple and elegant as a regular academy, but in fact, it hides a strange common sense replacement mechanism.
When students step into that special "sex guidance classroom", social norms and moral concepts will quietly change....

Characters

Corinne Moridia:

The daughter of the Moridia family, is noble and cold in appearance but full of curiosity about the unknown in her heart.
She has the arrogance and desire to dominate that are unique to the nobility, but also shows unexpected obedience in certain situations.

Layla Safirale:

The purple-haired Poison Princess of the Saffie family has light blue curly hair and wears a special school uniform.
Her mysterious vertical pupils and the "holy marks" on her lower abdomen show her extraordinary bloodline.

Features

  • 20 sexy and erotic images of beautiful girls.
  • A fantastical erotic story with girls who have unique personalities.
  • You can skip the puzzles if you just want to enjoy the story. (Press Enter during a puzzle).
  • CG Gallery mode. (Click the left and right buttons next to the CG after completing a puzzle).
